blocks.content:
Labels and evaluation timing shape how your alert behaves once it's live. Labels categorize the alert and drive notification routing — the right labels ensure the right team gets notified through the right channel. Evaluation timing controls how often Grafana checks the condition and how long it must persist before firing.

Together, they prevent two common problems: alerts that reach the wrong people, and alerts that fire on momentary spikes.

A pending period filters brief spikes during deployments or temporary load, so only sustained conditions trigger notifications.

In the next milestone, you learn how to configure the evaluation group, pending period, and labels.
